title: file formatter
description: A powerful file formatter that allows users to easily format and organize their files. It provides various formatting options such as renaming, sorting, and categorizing files based on user-defined rules. The tool is designed to help users manage their files efficiently and keep their digital workspace organized.
tech: File System API (for accessing and manipulating files on the user's device)
Drag and Drop API (for easy file uploading and organization)
Regular Expressions (for defining formatting rules and patterns)
